task_objective: Resolve all in-plugin updater code review findings: Decky installer argument order, pending update install metadata reconciliation on startup, release manifest asset name matching the release tag, SSL verification failures, update check in-flight promise-based guard, and rate limit cooldown on candidate install revalidation.
design_decisions: Changed invokeDeckyInstaller argument order to url, EXPECTED_PLUGIN_NAME, version, sha256, installType to match Decky contract. Decoupled reconciliation from get_update_check_context, calling it only on Plugin._main startup. Added release tag matching to release manifest filename validation. Resolved urllib SSL failures using a _get_ssl_context helper targeting standard Linux CA paths. Implemented React promise-based in-flight guard (inFlightCheck = useRef(...)) inside PluginUpdateSection.tsx to deduplicate concurrent RPC check calls. Routed revalidate_plugin_update through the service to check/record active rate-limit cooldown states.
results: All validation checks passed, 430 tests pass cleanly, formatting and type checking verify successfully.
